title: Centered Dyes
description: Simple resource pack to more consistently centers some of the dyes.
body:
Check out [Ultimate Item Centerer](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimate-item-centerer) for a better way to center that does it for all items

More consistently centers some of the dyes, specifically the black, blue, cyan, light gray, and orange ones.

Update should work in future versions. To remove the warning saying it is for an earlier version, open the pack.mcmeta file and change the "pack_format" value to the most recent version's value (which can be found [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pack_format)).
